title: Day 13: Day 13 — Technology & Tools
content:
# Day 13 — Technology & Tools

## Topic
How to use your brokerage tech stack as a recruiting advantage instead of just a feature list.

## 3–5 Key Points
- **Sell outcomes, not software names:** Agents don’t switch for "a CRM" — they switch for faster follow-up, better conversion, and fewer admin hours.
- **Show end-to-end workflow:** Demonstrate how lead capture, nurture, transaction management, and reporting connect in one practical system.
- **Proof beats promises:** Use quick demos, case studies, or before/after metrics to show what your tools actually do for production.
- **Adoption support is part of the offer:** Training, onboarding, templates, and coaching matter as much as the tools themselves.
- **Reduce tool chaos:** A clean, integrated stack is more attractive than a pile of disconnected apps agents have to stitch together.

## Why It Matters
Most brokerages claim they have "great tech." Very few prove it helps agents close more deals with less friction. When you position technology as a business growth system (and back it with support), you recruit stronger agents and reduce early churn after they join.
